title: New York Mortgage Trust to change name to Adamas Trust, ticker to ADAM
content:
New York Mortgage Trust (NASDAQ:NYMT [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/NYMT]) announced [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20217650-new-york-mortgage-trust-inc-announces-corporate-rebrand-to-adamas-trust-inc] on Tuesday a corporate rebrand to Adamas Trust, effective as of 12:01 AM ET on September 3.

The mortgage REIT is also set to change its ticker symbol to ADAM.

Shares were -1.64% pre-market to $7.10.

The company said the rebrand marks the next step in its evolution into a multi-dimensional investment and operating platform, unbound by geography.

Also, New York Mortgage Trust will change the trading symbol for its 8.000% series D fixed-to-floating rate cumulative redeemable preferred stock to ADAMN from NYMTN, 7.875% series E fixed-to-floating rate cumulative redeemable preferred stock to ADAMM from NYMTM, its 6.875% series F fixed-to-floating rate cumulative redeemable preferred stock to ADAML from NYMTL, its 7.000% series G cumulative redeemable preferred stock to ADAMZ from NYMTZ, its 9.125% senior notes due 2029 to ADAMI from NYMTI, its 9.125% senior notes due 2030 to ADAMG from NYMTG, and its 9.875% senior notes due 2030 to ADAMH from NYMTH.
